import multiprocessing
from typing import List, Any

def process_data(items: List[int]) -> List[int]:
    with multiprocessing.Pool(processes=4) as pool:
        return pool.map(_square, items)

def _square(x: int) -> int:
    return x * x

def process_batch(data: List[dict]) -> List[dict]:
    with multiprocessing.Pool() as pool:
        return pool.map(_transform, data)

def _transform(item: dict) -> dict:
    return {k: v.upper() if isinstance(v, str) else v for k, v in item.items()}

def run_pipeline(items: List[str]) -> List[str]:
    with multiprocessing.Pool(processes=8) as pool:
        return pool.map(_process_item, items)

def _process_item(item: str) -> str:
    return item.strip().lower()
